title: Atomic note+witness insert prevents permanently unspendable notes
description: db.rs insert_note_with_witness wraps the note INSERT and witness INSERT in a single SQLite transaction. This is correct: spendable_notes() uses INNER JOIN on witnesses, so a note without a witness row is permanently excluded from the spendable set. A contributor might 'simplify' by doing separate inserts. Preserve: the atomicity here is load-bearing for the invariant that every note in spendable_notes() has a witness.
